posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: Grogers70426
posts.body: Supposedly they have a card the same night as UFC 328, which is this weekend, but they don't even have a single fight listed. You would think that they would have a main event listed. I noticed that they canceled the 3 previous shows this year, so maybe this show is canceled too, but it just hasn't been made official. * Edited at 05.03.2026, 11:58 AM ET *

posts.author: The Giraffe
posts.body: Lights Out is in some weird legal/ownership limbo. Ownership borrowed money from some management company, didn't repay by a certain date or violated other terms of the agreement, and the management company claimed to be the new owners as a way of recouping their money and began restructuring. Now it's being sorted out in court.
